== Notes for [[Item:Q112067|Q112067]] ==

Nuño Nuñez "el de Castrogeriz", señor de Amaya

b. circa 855

Father Nuño Nuñez "Rasura", señor de Amaya1,2 b. circa 825, d. after 860

Mother Argilo (?)1,2 b. circa 830

Also called Count of Castile Nuno Nuñez el de Castrojeriz.1 Nuño Nuñez "el de Castrogeriz", señor de Amaya was born circa 855. He was the son of Nuño Nuñez "Rasura", señor de Amaya and Argilo (?).1,2 Nuño Nuñez "el de Castrogeriz", señor de Amaya married Asura Díaz de Castilla, daughter of Diego II Rodríguez "Porcelos", conde de Castilla and Asura Asnurez, before 885.1,3,2 Nuño Nuñez "el de Castrogeriz", señor de Amaya was living in 909.3

Family

Asura Díaz de Castilla b. circa 865?

Child

Munia domna Nuñez de Amaya+ b. c 885, d. a 5 Aug 9351,4

Citations

[S187] Royal Genealogy Database, online http://www.dcs.hull.ac.uk/public/genealogy/

[S1316] Reyes y Reinos Genealogias, online www.homar.org, España - 08.A.

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 287-38.

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 287-37.

Señor de Castrogeriz (909)
Conde de Castilla

Señor de Castrogeriz (909)
Conde de Castilla

[large-G675.FTW]

Believed to have married a sister of Conde Diego de Castile.

SOURCE NOTES:
www.dcs.hull.ac.uk/cgi-bin/gedlkup/n=royal?royal11062

* Povoador de Castrogeriz (Castro Xerez), dominou a parte ocidental de Castela
* Falecido antes de 899

RESEARCH NOTES:
Count of Castile. Believed to have married sister of Count Diego de Castile

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Count Of Castile

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Count Of Castile

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
